{{CargoRelic
|name=Head of Paramara
|class_id=20308
|rank=Green
|affct=TECH
|source=
|description=In an operation to infiltrate a Demon God base, the previous snail from the base encountered a terrifying monster. After doing all it could, it killed the monster and brought the head back as a trophy, though it was hurt badly itself.
|fame=18
|art=9
|fth=21
|civ=16
|tech=26
|ss1=Per 5 Mutant Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +2<br>Mutant Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss2=Per 5 Mutant Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +4<br>Mutant Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss3=Per 5 Mutant Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +6<br>Mutant Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss4=Per 5 Mutant Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +6<br>Mutant Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150
|ss7=Per 5 Mutant Gene LVLs, Snail ATK +6<br>Mutant Gene LVLs Researched: 150/150<br> (Awakened)
}}
